testcase.name: testExecutorRejectsEventsAfterShutdown
testcase.system-out: 19:23:18.980 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor initialized with cached thread pool executor 19:23:19.083 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 19:23:19.086 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 19:23:19.087 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully 19:23:19.088 [main] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Executor is not running, rejecting event: command 19:23:19.090 [main] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Executor already shut down

testcase.name: testHandleFeishuEventReturns200Ok
